title: thelypteris coarctata
intro: Thelypteris coarctata, also known as the contracted leather fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Thelypteris coarctata has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, and is often used to treat conditions like bronchitis and coughs. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and teas, which can be made by steeping the leaves in hot water to release their medicinal compounds.
